Submits the OTP code received via email to complete authentication.

## Import

```ts
import { AuthClient } from "@alchemy/signer";
```

## Parameters

### params

`SubmitOtpCodeParams`

- The parameters for submitting the OTP

### params.otpCode

`string`

- The OTP code received via email

## Returns

`Promise<Signer>`
A promise that resolves to a Signer instance upon successful authentication
